nasb.text: Also there were those who said, “We have borrowed money for the king’s tax on our fields and our vineyards.

esv.text: And there were those who said, “We have borrowed money for the king’s tax on our fields and our vineyards.

cnv.text: 有些人說：“我們為了要借錢向王納稅，只好抵押了我們的田地和葡萄園。

ccb.text: 有的说：“我们要借钱才能缴纳王对我们的田地和葡萄园征收的税。
